title: elaeagnus iliensis
intro: Elaeagnus iliensis, also known as the Ili shrub or silverberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Elaeagnus iliensis include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
